title: Blackboard Experience Entry
description: Schema for an individual experience file stored in ftm-state/blackboard/experiences/

task_type.description: Category of task this experience was recorded from (e.g. feature, bugfix, refactor)

task_description.description: Human-readable description of the task that generated this experience

agent_team.description: Names of agents that participated in executing the task

wave_count.description: Number of execution waves that occurred during the task

audit_outcomes.description: Summary of audit results across all waves

pass.description: Number of audit checks that passed without modification

auto_fix.description: Number of audit checks that were automatically corrected

fail.description: Number of audit checks that failed and required manual resolution

lessons_learned.description: Key takeaways extracted from this experience for future sessions

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this experience was recorded

confidence.description: Confidence score for this experience (0.0 = low, 1.0 = high)

tags.description: Free-form labels for indexing and retrieval

code_patterns.description: Working code snippets discovered during this task — the final correct version, not the failed attempts. Include imports, setup, and the actual call pattern.

module.description: The primary module/library this pattern uses (e.g. shared_services.okta.groups)

code.description: The working code snippet — complete and copy-pasteable

description.description: One-line description of what this pattern does

api_gotchas.description: Surprising API behaviors, wrong assumptions, and type mismatches discovered during this task. Things that caused errors and would cause them again without this note.

module.description: The module/API where the gotcha was discovered

gotcha.description: What's surprising or wrong — e.g. 'list_members() returns OktaUser objects, not dicts'

wrong_assumption.description: What you'd naturally assume that turns out to be wrong

playbook_ref.description: Path to the brain.py playbook entry if one was created from this experience, for cross-referencing
